original_statement: which china player has scored more than 3 goals?
mutated_statement: which regional person has done something more than a few things?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Role generalization + Action vagueness + Quantity vagueness: "china"→"regional" (specific country→vague region) | "player"→"person" (specific role→generic) | "has scored"→"has done something" (specific sport action→vague action) | "more than 3 goals"→"more than a few things" (precise numeric + object→vague quantity + object).

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中可识别的关键信息有：“The phrase 'has done something more than a few things' is reasonably interpreted as... Qu Bo is listed scoring in four matches... Therefore, the Prediction Answer 'qu bo' matches the data.” Agent在日志中直接用确定语气解释和给出具体答案“qu bo”，并未提及原始或变异问题的模糊、不确定或需要澄清的信息。Agent的具体表现为：直接将模糊表述映射为“在得分名单中出现次数最多”的明确任务，执行检索并给出确定性结论。因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
